title: FFPE Sectioning: 10x Visium HD
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f10qv","text":"Protocol for sectioning formalin-fixed, paraffin-embedded tissue blocks for the 10x Genomics Visium HD assay.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare Fisher Superfrost plus slides. See 10X CG000698 for other acceptable slides.
Determine allowable tissue placement area according to attached document. CG000548_VisiumCytAssist-AccessoryKit_QuickReferenceCards_A5format_RevF.pdf
Section, dry, and store tissue according to attached document (2.2-2.3). CG000684_VisiumHDFFPETissuePrepHandbook_RevD.pdf
